75479.subject: The Daily Degen - July 4th, 2026
75479.body:
View this post on the web at https://thedailydegen.substack.com/p/the-daily-degen-july-4th-2026

Happy Saturday good degens! And Happy 4th of July!
Let’s get after it!
As always… stats/alerts/etc at top and tweets/news/links/videos/etc at bottom… and all tweets are hyperlinked so just click on them to pull them up on Twitter/X!
Market Update
Crypto (from @CryptoBubbles
Total Crypto Market Cap: $2.245T
QQQ (Nasdaq 100): $712.60
Gold: $4,174.10
Silver: $59.62
Oil (WTI): $68.78
US 10Y Treasury: 4.485%
Crypto Fear & Greed Index (from coinmarketcap(dot)com): 27
Biggest Price Movers
(From @coingecko top 1000, by 24 hour change)
Spotlight
Huge news from @maplefinance [ https://substack.com/redirect/2248d982-1c89-4893-bdf7-535fa9b93bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] friends!
They are now live on Robinhood Chain - and have introduced a new yield-bearing asset called $USDG! 
As stated in their announcement tweet:
“Maple is expanding into the Robinhood ecosystem, with syrupUSDG and syrupUSDC now live on Robinhood Chain.
Steakhouse approved Maple’s syrupUSDG as collateral for the vault used in Robinhood Earn, the first decentralized lending product available within the Robinhood app.”
This is a MASSIVELY bullish announcement for Maple- as it means their yield will be directly available to Robinhood’s 22M active users! (see tweet on it from Maple co-founder @syrupsid below!)
And this is just the latest bullish announcement from the Maple team, who have been stacking huge wins of late despite the broader bear market!
Learn more about everything Maple is doing on the upcoming Investor Call on July 8th! (click here [ https://substack.com/redirect/08fee8a4-7bd2-4156-8287-a2ec52973bb9?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] to put it on your schedule and submit any questions you have!)
And as always make sure to follow Maple on Twitter [ https://substack.com/redirect/2248d982-1c89-4893-bdf7-535fa9b93bb0?j=eyJ1IjoiMXN4Zm00In0.wehL2Vke0PUDz1PHD6ZKtcy1ufIoeqpblecCEEWPpqI ] for more updates, and stay tuned as we continue bringing attention to everything they are doing!
Biggest TVL Movers + Other Interesting Data
Chains are mixed today. 19 of the top 25 chains are green on the weekly. 
Protocols are also mixed today. 13 of the top 25 protocols are green on the weekly. 
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Chains By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 12 Fastest-Growing Protocols By TVL On The Weekly With At Least $100M TVL (from @DefiLlama):
Here’s The Top 10 Dex’s By 7 Day Volume (from @DefiLlama):
New Projects
(note: this includes new projects we find through combing Twitter each day and going through newly launched protocols added by @DefiLlama, limited primarily to new projects that have at least some TVL or are followed by at least some of our mutuals… Disclaimer: these are not pre-vetted by us so make sure to DYOR!)
-New project

75471.subject: 📰 AI-curated Daily Crypto Digest — July 4
75471.body:
AI-Curated Daily Crypto Digest

Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi


Автор: Oleh Bezuhlyi

    
    
    Прочитайте цю статтю на LinkedIn, щоб приєднатися до обговорення
Прочитати на LinkedIn
https://www.linkedin.com/comm/pulse/ai-curated-daily-crypto-digest-july-4-oleh-bezuhlyi-yryhf?lipi=urn%3Ali%3Apage%3Aemail_email_series_follow_newsletter_02%3Bb7V4oAp8Ste1Sn72h54D%2Fg%3D%3D&midToken=AQFTjFOONAfT2w&midSig=37781b7Fefvck1&trk=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_&trkEmail=eml-email_series_follow_newsletter_02-null-0-read_more_banner_cta_-null-fz96fz~mr6kd5ei~ox-null-null&eid=fz96fz-mr6kd5ei-ox
  
🧠 AI's Crypto News Brief: Bitcoin clawed back above $62K after touching multi-year lows, but the mood stays cautious — ETF outflows, a USDT delisting, and tightening rules across the UK and EU keep regulation firmly in the driver's seat. 🇬🇧 UK Unveils Sweeping Crypto Rules to Court Global Trading Britain's FCA rolled out a comprehensive digital-asset framework designed to open the country to global crypto liquidity and institutional players. Analysts praised the ambition but warned the authorization process could prove daunting, leaving major compliance hurdles that may slow the rollout. Read full story 💳 Revolut to Delist Tether's USDT by August 31 Europe's largest fintech notified customers it will drop USDT after August 31, citing regulatory and risk concerns. Users can buy for a few more days and withdraw until the deadline, after which any remaining balances are automatically converted into their base fiat currency. More details 🇪🇺 EU Moves to Bar Retail Investors From Prediction Markets European regulators signalled a crackdown on the multibillion-dollar prediction-market boom, stressing that a product's function as a derivative — not its branding — determines compliance. The move would wall retail traders off from one of crypto's hottest 2026 growth areas. Read more 🏦 Germany's Sparkassen to Offer Crypto Inside Banking Apps Germany's vast Sparkassen savings-bank network and cooperative banks are preparing to let everyday customers trade crypto directly through their standard banking apps. Framed under MiCA, the rollout could accelerate mainstream adoption across Europe and pressure rival banks to follow. See details 📈 BlackRock Puts Tokenization at Center of $400B Private-Markets Push BlackRock is expanding aggressively into private markets with a $400 billion fundraising goal, placing tokenization at the heart of the strategy. The move underscores how the world's largest asset manager sees blockchain steadily reshaping traditional finance. Read full story ⚖️ US Sheriffs Drop Opposition to CLARITY Act, Boosting Senate Odds The Major County Sheriffs of America shifted from opposition to neutral on the digital-asset CLARITY Act, removing a key roadblock as the bill advances through the Senate. The group still wants amendments giving local law enforcement more resources to chase illicit-finance cases. More details 📉 Bitc

75463.subject: “Trophy wives” are out of fashion
75463.body:
<link rel=stylesheet href=https://marber-cdn.economist.com/foundations/latest/css/font-face.css>
 The Economist

 
 


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjd9AAcAAAAAA46s8saMcjxqAG_RisLDBbcEXaWYtDMamIjFplwv31KLo0Vda-ZY8fC54M13TiDcTXLhddsq8Si-IQOw9zQX7ypraDLfZiW8m1uBPdtuec9u 

July 4th 2026

 

 
 
 
The Economist This Weekend

 


 
 
 

 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjd9AAcAAAAAA46s8saWWUOrcoXP4BjbjpXuT8UliYjNUdb8JLM0YWUedmfZ43Y9SZ0BsJRCeBK5_zhADxKAjFob6aKpMdouQmNW_fXbBvDAVzbMDZ8Zgvt2 

https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjd9AAcAAAAAA46s8saYjMQQVXSqafhu60lv9vbFvK09TDbFw-4-Wrlfgb2EJntgEj7MBWiF3KGP0u96lMI0NLjuZpvkt61B5nIX-6EOzUQyCD5tadfcpSIu 


 


https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjd9AAcAAAAAA46s8saa6AFm67eQxXEjZY3Rb__Gga1-_pc9e0F0CA4FzjerljKBOyj7oaNN9X_rt_G8UcYacW24EnPEAycmtBGYBc0dpSzIcJ5DkLs 



Doug Dowson

Data journalist



Wealthy people live differently from the rest of us. Their homes are bigger, their cars are shinier and their clothes are more stylish. And historically their partners have been younger, too.


Growing up in the 1990s I saw business tycoons such as Hugh Hefner and Hollywood stars such as Michael Douglas paired with women decades younger than them. Back then, it seemed normal for men of a certain age and status to marry “trophy wives”.


But this phenomenon 
https://click.e.economist.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ5Mjd9AAcAAAAAA46s8sabmeuMffr7R41Ohas4o34Cw3AHaGGXkJAptuDwDq00ryofe8j4adoFwQZvyp9ZmT1hkkRy
